heading: Rank, pay, and allowances of Corps of Engineers officers serving as President of Mississippi River Commission
label: 642a Rank, pay, and allowances of Corps of Engineers officers serving as President of Mississippi River Commission
text: Any officer of the Corps of Engineers who has served or shall serve four years as President of the Mississippi River Commission and who has been or shall subsequently be retired, shall, from the date of such retirement, receive the rank, pay, and allowances of a retired major general.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 10, Armed Forces, by , .section 1026b of title 10act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 170A Stat. 1
